denny.name: Denny
denny.description: Bright orange-red baby crab in a tiny space suit, curious and cheerful, small claws, big expressive eyes
denny.image_prompt: One cute cartoon baby crab in a tiny white space suit, orange-red color, round helmet with visor, two small symmetrical claws raised cheerfully, happy smile, floating in space with stars in background, centered in large empty white space, soft watercolor painting style, white background, no other characters, no writing, no text, no letters

mama_coral.name: Mommy Coral
mama_coral.description: Warm coral-pink mother crab in a pink space suit, nurturing, slightly larger with a pearl necklace on the helmet
mama_coral.image_prompt: Cute cartoon young mother crab in a pink space suit with helmet, warm coral-pink color, small pearl necklace on the helmet ring, youthful happy face with big bright eyes through visor, smooth round body, no wrinkles, looks like a young mom, two small claws, full body visible, children's book illustration style, simple, friendly, transparent background

daddy_reef.name: Daddy Reef

sandy.name: Sandy

finn.name: Finn
finn.description: Orange clownfish in a custom fish-shaped space suit, brave and adventurous
finn.image_prompt: ONE single cute cartoon clownfish wearing a tiny orange astronaut jetpack on its back, orange and white stripes, brave happy expression, small fins spread wide, zooming through space with a glowing jetpack flame, ONLY ONE CHARACTER, no other animals, no other characters, children's book illustration style, simple, friendly, transparent background
